resolution_note: 100x100 crops (byte-identical to ResNet/ConvNeXt) resized to 224 (ViT-S/14 -> 256 patch tokens) immediately before ImageNet-normalize, in both train and eval. 224 is native DINOv2 resolution.
freeze_scheme: Phase A: freeze whole backbone, train head; Phase B: unfreeze all, discriminative LRs. LayerNorm only (no BatchNorm) -> BN-freeze N/A.
data: dataset_v1 synth + 30 manual + game4 + game5 PGN (combined)
